notableEvents.label: Balk run(s)
notableEvents.detail: With Lourdes Gurriel Jr. batting, Corbin Carroll scores on a balk. Geraldo Perdomo advances to 2nd on a balk.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Jorge Barrosa out at 2nd. Ketel Marte out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: James McCann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James McCann grounds into a double play, pitcher Sean Newcomb to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. James McCann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci pops out to third baseman Nolan Arenado in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters triples (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds out, second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Everson Pereira out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
